title: Add weekly SEO priority report automation
summary: Records release evidence for the weekly SEO priority report generator, the populated tracker fixture, and the playbook update that turns imported Search Console data into a ranked refresh queue across immediate refresh, promotion, intent correction, and no-data buckets.
completed_todo_items: Refresh underperforming pages with stronger titles, FAQs, comparison tables, and clearer search intent alignment.

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the weekly report generator classifies tracker rows into the expected refresh buckets and emits a ranked markdown report.

ops.rollback_plan: Delete the priority report generator, fixture, test, and playbook references if the SEO review flow is replaced with a different reporting model.
